name: 9q21_11_FXN_Friedreich_locus
description: 9q21.11 FXN (frataxin) intron 1 GAA-trinucleotide repeat expansion locus. Normal allele 5-33 repeats, premutation 34-65, full disease >100-1700. Most common autosomal recessive ataxia in Europe (Friedreich ataxia).

architecture.internal_structure: GAA tandem repeat in FXN intron 1; expansion causes heterochromatinization and reduced FXN expression.
